wins_analysis: No wins today. Zero targets were hit despite a trending_down regime that should have favored SELL setups.
losses_analysis: Both executed trades hit stop loss, indicating entries were placed at weak supply zones that got swept before price moved in the intended direction. The AI was unavailable (0% probability shown) and zone score fallback produced low-conviction setups that lacked proper confirmation. With only 1 setup found across all 50 stocks, the system forced a trade in suboptimal conditions rather than staying flat.
regime_impact: The trending_down regime with ADX=25 should have helped SELL-side trades, but the execution failed — likely because entry levels were too close to recent swing highs, allowing normal pullback volatility to trigger stops before continuation. The regime was favorable but zone selection was poor.

improvements.action: Do NOT place orders when AI is unavailable and zone score fallback produces fewer than 3 setups across Nifty 50. Require minimum 3 qualifying setups to confirm broad alignment before committing capital.
improvements.reason: Today only 1 setup was found with 0% AI probability — this is effectively a no-signal day but 2 trades still executed and both lost.

improvements.action: Widen the buffer between entry and stop loss to minimum 1.0% for SELL setups in trending regimes. Today's RELIANCE setup had only 0.61% SL distance (8.23/1349), which is easily swept by intraday noise.
improvements.reason: Both trades hit SL suggesting entries were too tight relative to intraday volatility. With VIX at 16.2, a 0.6% stop is insufficient.

improvements.action: On AI-unavailable days, require price to confirm direction with a 15-min close below the supply zone before activating SELL limit orders, rather than placing pending orders preemptively.
improvements.reason: Pending orders got filled and immediately reversed — waiting for confirmation candle would have filtered out the false breakdowns.

improvements.action: Cap maximum daily loss at ₹1,500 (1 trade loss) on fallback/low-conviction days. If first trade hits SL, cancel all remaining pending orders for the day.
improvements.reason: Two losses of ~₹1,000 each compounded to ₹-1,997. Cutting after first loss would have saved ~₹1,000.

improvements.action: When AI is offline, prioritize only stocks with ATR-normalized zone strength above 2.0 (zone width relative to daily ATR). Avoid symbols where the zone is thinner than 1x ATR.
improvements.reason: RELIANCE target was 24.69 points away but stop was only 8.23 — the R:R looked good on paper but the zone was likely too thin relative to RELIANCE's daily range, causing premature stop hits.

tomorrow_focus: If AI remains unavailable, stay completely flat unless 3+ high-quality supply zones align with continuation of the downtrend confirmed by first 30-min price action.

symbol_notes.RELIANCE.NS: Supply zone at 1349 failed — price swept above 1357 before any meaningful drop. Mark 1357-1360 as a stronger supply level; only re-enter SELL if price retests and rejects from 1360+ with volume confirmation.
